item.title: Philippines: Tropical Cyclone Nari - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Philippines
Glide: TC-2026-000101-PHL

Tropical Cyclone Nari intensified to severe status with wind speeds reaching 240 km/h. Widespread infrastructure damage reported across the central Philippines. Estimated 150,000 displaced persons. Supply lines cut to remote areas.

item.title: Bangladesh: Floods - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Bangladesh
Glide: FL-2026-000102-BGD

Flood waters receding in Bangladesh but impacts persist. An estimated 2.1 million people affected across 20 districts. Water-borne disease outbreak reported in three affected areas.

item.title: Indonesia: Mount Merapi Eruption - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Indonesia
Glide: VO-2026-000200-IDN

Mount Merapi major eruption: ash column reached 15,000 meters. Pyroclastic flows detected. Alert status critical. Immediate evacuation expanded to 7 km radius affecting 200,000+ persons. Airport ash closure ongoing.
